history.title: About the Casino
history.description1: Shark Casino is an online casino platform where we bring together multiple gaming categories for our guests. Our casino lobby includes featured games, new games, Originals, slots, live games, table games, crash games, Shark Specials, virtual sports, bingo, keno, scratch cards, minigames, and provider-based browsing.
items: Shark Casino lists 9,234 New Games on the official casino page.
Our casino page includes 57 Game Providers.
Shark Rewards includes XP, level progression, the Shark Shop, and a daily spin wheel.
history.description2: Our game library is structured for variety and discovery. The official casino page lists 11 Originals, 9,234 New Games, 7,418 Slot Games, 921 Live Games, 394 Table Games, and 57 Game Providers, giving our guests a wide selection of ways to explore casino entertainment.
history.description3:
We support engagement through Shark Rewards and promotions. Our rewards page explains that guests begin earning rewards from the first bet, collect XP, progress through shark-themed levels, access the Shark Shop, receive weekly shop updates, and can use a daily spin wheel available every day at 5pm GMT.

Our casino is operated by Astor Holdings Ltd and is licensed by the Finance Authority of the State of Anjouan under The Computer Gaming Licensing Act 007 of 2005, license number 15727. We also provide responsible gaming tools, including deposit limits, time reminders, self-exclusion options, and account history tracking, supported by a dedicated team trained to assist guests.

customHtml.title: Shark Casino — Ocean-Themed Atmosphere, Game Areas and Online Entertainment
customHtml.description:

We bring casino, sports book, rewards, promotions, live casino, table games, crash games, Shark Specials, Originals, slots, bingo, keno, scratch cards, minigames and virtual sports into one convenient lobby. Our casino is available online every day, giving users the freedom to choose favourite games, bonuses and events at the right time. In the Originals area, we offer Limbo, Mines, Keno, Dice, Blackjack, Baccarat, Roulette, Advanced Dice, Plinko, Diamonds and Wheel. Shark Specials highlights themed titles such as Jaws of Justice, Big Bass Splash 1000, Release the Kraken Megaways, Octo Attack, Jawsome Pirates, Cursed Seas and Queen of Atlantis. Slot players can explore thousands of games, including new releases, featured games, jackpot-style titles and demo play. In live casino and table games, we focus on roulette, blackjack, baccarat, live formats and classic table entertainment. Instead of a physical bar or hotel, we provide a digital lounge experience where leisure, cashier tools, support, rewards and promotions are available directly inside the account. Shark Rewards adds Daily Spin Wheel, Shark Shop, cashback bonuses, weekly rewards, personalised offers and VIP-style service. We also develop the promotions area with Four Play on the first four deposits, Daily Prize Wheel and exclusive rewards. Shark Casino is built for users who want quick access, a deep game catalogue, premium presentation and a strong reward system. We make online entertainment flexible, vivid and immersive while keeping the Shark Casino identity across every section.


Zone Days Hours
Shark Casino Online Lobby Daily 24/7
Originals and Shark Specials Daily 24/7
Slot Games and New Games Daily 24/7

Crash Games, Keno, Bingo and Scratch Cards Daily 24/7

Shark Casino — Support, Languages, Payments and Withdrawals

At Shark Casino, we build service around fast assistance, clear instructions and secure player guidance. Our support helps with registration, login, bonuses, rewards, promotions, cashier actions, withdrawals, KYC checks and gameplay questions. The interface includes Support and Contact Us sections, with an email contact available for written requests. We keep communication practical, giving players clear steps for deposits, bonuses, withdrawals and account settings. Shark Casino is available through desktop, mobile and other supported platforms, so users can manage their account in a convenient digital format.


The current main service version of Shark Casino is presented in English, and the English version of the terms is the legally binding version for the relationship between the user and the platform. We use clear section names such as Lobby, Rewards, Promotions, Casino, Sports Book, Live Casino Games and New Games so players can quickly find the right area. For users who prefer structured service, the cashier, transaction history, support channels and bonus rules are especially important. We keep the account journey simple: register, log in, choose a game, deposit, activate a promotion and request a withdrawal. This approach supports confidence for both new users and active players.


For payments, Shark Casino supports fiat money and cryptocurrency operations, with available methods shown inside the account cashier. The terms state that the platform works with cryptocurrencies and fiat currency, including examples such as USD, EUR, BRL and CNY, while each deposit detail is checked by the user before confirmation. For cryptocurrency deposits, wallet and network information is displayed inside the deposit area, while cryptocurrency withdrawals are paid to the wallet address entered in the valid withdrawal request. The digital cashier works as the online equivalent of an ATM and exchange desk, showing balance, methods, fees, limits and transaction status. Upon the first deposit and later, we may carry out identity, address and payment-method or crypto-wallet ownership checks.


A withdrawal at Shark Casino begins with balance review, email verification, the selected method and completion of applicable requirements. For crypto withdrawals, the relevant deposit must receive at least 3 blockchain confirmations, while fiat withdrawals after approval may take up to 3 business days depending on the payment provider. We may request KYC documents, and withdrawals above $2,000 may require enhanced verification procedures. Once KYC and document checks are complete, withdrawal requests are processed within a maximum of 5 business days from the date all required documentation has been received and verified. Users are responsible for declaring and paying any applicable taxes, duties or charges on winnings; for most recreational players, winnings are generally not treated as taxable income unless play is professional or business-like activity.


Shark Casino — Access Rules, Account Entry and Comfortable Play

Shark Casino operates online, so users enter our casino through a personal Member Account. To play real-money games, including cryptocurrency play, the user first needs to register and open an account. We create a secure environment where the player confirms adult status, enters accurate details and plays only on their own behalf. At Shark Casino, users should use only legally obtained fiat or cryptocurrency funds that belong to them. One user may hold only one account, helping maintain a fair rewards, promotions and payout system. We may conduct KYC and identity verification at any time to protect the account, payments and withdrawals. No physical dress code is required for online play, so each user chooses a comfortable setting independently. In live casino, table games, chat and other game sections, we support respectful, proper and fair behaviour. Online access requires no parking, travel or reservation, only a device, internet connection and account access. Shark Casino is available through desktop, mobile and other supported platforms. The fast route inside our casino is simple: register, log in, open the cashier, then choose Casino, Sports Book, Rewards or Promotions. The main purpose of our rules is to make the gaming experience transparent, protected and comfortable.


Access and Registration

  • • Create a personal Shark Casino Member Account before real-money play.
  • • Enter accurate, current and complete details, including an accessible email address.
  • • Confirm that you play in a personal recreational capacity and on your own behalf.
  • • Use only your own fiat money, cryptocurrency, payment methods and crypto wallet.
  • • Keep one account per user to maintain fair access to bonuses and rewards.

Dress Code and Behaviour

  • • No physical dress code is required for online play, so users choose their own comfortable atmosphere.
  • • In live games and table games, we support respectful conduct toward dealers, players and table rules.
  • • In promotions and rewards, users should follow conditions, deadlines, wagering rules and game restrictions.
  • • We create a positive gaming environment where fair play, transparency and responsible participation matter.

Restrictions and Prohibited Actions

  • • Access is available only to users who meet age and registration requirements.
  • • Borrowed documents, third-party payments, third-party crypto wallets and inaccurate data are not permitted.
  • • Multiple accounts created to claim additional bonuses, rewards or promotions are not allowed.
  • • Fraud, automated play, IP masking, geo-location manipulation, suspicious transactions and bonus abuse are not allowed.
  • • Promotional rewards and bonus funds are used only under the rules of the selected offer.

Parking and How to Access Shark Casino

  • • Online play at Shark Casino requires no parking, travel or entrance queue.
  • • Open the site from desktop, mobile or another supported device.
  • • Before playing, check internet access, account access, email and the selected payment method.
  • • The fastest path is Login or Register, then Lobby, Casino, Sports Book, Rewards, Promotions or Support.

Shark Casino — Shark Rewards, Tiers and Daily Spin Wheel

Shark Rewards is our reward system that turns player activity into cashback bonuses, weekly rewards, personalised promotions, Shark Shop access and premium service. We built the programme around the idea of diving deeper into luxury, where the user moves through levels and unlocks more opportunities. Shark Rewards includes Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond and Ruby. The tiers are linked to level ranges and wager amount: Bronze starts at $0, Silver begins at $10k wager amount, Gold at $50k, Diamond at $150k and Ruby at $450k. On Bronze, users already receive 10% wagering rewards, Shark Shop Access, Earn Rewards Right Away and Daily Spin Wheel. Silver grows to 12.5% wagering rewards and adds new shop items, redeem coins for cash and bonus growth. Gold unlocks 15% wagering rewards, new shop items, redeem coins for cash, Daily Spin Wheel and bonus growth. Diamond strengthens benefits to 17.5% wagering rewards, premium shop items, redeem coins for cash and bonus growth. Ruby is our ultimate level with 20% wagering rewards, bespoke rewards upon request, redeem rewards for cash, Daily Spin Wheel, bonus growth and VIP Manager. We also add Birthday Bonus Surprise, Priority Service, personalised bonus drops and higher limits for bigger plays. Shark Rewards is created for players who want more than gameplay: progression, personal attention and regular privileges.


Registration Conditions

  • • Active Shark Casino account — the basic requirement for participating in the rewards system.
  • • Compliance with age, registration and jurisdiction requirements.
  • • Verified account — bonuses are available to registered users with a confirmed profile.
  • • One account per user, with no linked duplicate profiles or repeated registration.
  • • Gameplay and wagering activity support progression through the levels.
  • • Shark Shop, Daily Spin Wheel and personalised rewards become part of the account experience through programme activity.

Shark Rewards Tiers and How to Reach Them

  • • Bronze, Levels 1–12, Entry: $0 wager amount, 10% wagering rewards, Shark Shop Access, Earn Rewards Right Away and Daily Spin Wheel.
  • • Silver, Levels 13–24, Advanced: $10k wager amount, 12.5% wagering rewards, new shop items, redeem coins for cash, Daily Spin Wheel and bonus growth.
  • • Gold, Levels 25–39, Premium: $50k wager amount, 15% wagering rewards, new shop items, redeem coins for cash, Daily Spin Wheel and bonus growth.
  • • Diamond, Levels 40–51, Elite: $150k wager amount, 17.5% wagering rewards, premium shop items, redeem coins for cash, Daily Spin Wheel and bonus growth.
  • • Ruby, Levels 51–60, Ultimate: $450k wager amount, 20% wagering rewards, bespoke rewards upon request, redeem rewards for cash, Daily Spin Wheel, bonus growth and VIP Manager.

Bonuses and Benefits

  • • Daily Spin Wheel: a daily reward mechanic with a chance to receive extra prizes.
  • • Shark Shop Access: a rewards shop where the user receives more options as the tier grows.
  • • Cashback bonuses: return-style bonuses adapted to the player’s style.
  • • Weekly rewards: regular rewards that keep activity engaging.
  • • Personalised Bonus Drops: personal bonuses matched to the user’s favourite games.
  • • Birthday Bonus Surprise: an individual reward for a special date.
  • • Priority Service: premium support and a dedicated account manager at higher service levels.
  • • Higher Limits, Bigger Plays: expanded possibilities for players moving into the deep end.
  • • VIP Manager: personal service at Ruby level.
  • • Win a Shark Diving Experience: a daily chance to win a shark diving experience as part of the rewards concept.

Shark Casino — Bonuses, Winnings, Promotions and Special Offers

At Shark Casino, we develop bonuses as part of a deeper gaming experience where promotions, rewards, shop items, Daily Prize Wheel and personal bonus drops work together. The main promotional mechanic for new users is Four Play, a deposit bonus on the first four deposits, designed to strengthen the starting journey in our casino. We also offer Daily Prize Wheel, where users can participate in a daily prize mechanic and get extra reasons to return to the account. Shark Rewards adds cashback bonuses, weekly rewards and exclusive promotions built around the user’s style of play. At Silver, Gold, Diamond and Ruby levels, users unlock shop items, redeem coins for cash or redeem rewards for cash. Birthday Bonus Surprise makes a special date even better through a personal bonus. Personalised Bonus Drops allow users to receive offers matched to favourite games rather than generic promotions. Higher Limits, Bigger Plays is created for players who want a wider scale for deposits, withdrawals and play. As part of the rewards concept, users also receive a chance to win a shark diving experience. The promotions page supports exclusive campaigns, including Four Play, Daily Prize Wheel and XP activity. Bonus conditions may include wagering requirement, contribution by game type, maximum bet and maximum payout from bonus funds. We make Shark Casino bonuses rich, personal and connected to real activity.

customHtml_2.title: Shark Casino — Popular Games, Originals, Shark Specials and Live Casino
customHtml_2.description:
At Shark Casino, we shape the catalogue so users can quickly move to a preferred pace: Originals, slots, live games, table games, crash games, Shark Specials, virtual sports, bingo, keno, scratch cards and minigames. Originals is one of our key areas and includes Limbo, Mines, Keno, Dice, Blackjack, Baccarat, Roulette, Advanced Dice, Plinko, Diamonds and Wheel. These games suit fast decisions, clear mechanics and short sessions. Shark Specials highlights games with ocean, adventure and shark-style energy, including Jaws of Justice, Big Bass Splash 1000, Release the Kraken Megaways, Octo Attack, Jawsome Pirates, Cursed Seas and Queen of Atlantis. In slot games, we offer thousands of titles, while New Games includes more than 9,000 entries, making the catalogue especially deep. Featured Games includes popular titles such as Sugar Rush Super Scatter, Sweet Bonanza Super Scatter, Gates of Olympus 1000, Le Bandit, Zeus vs Hades — Gods of War and Wanted Dead or a Wild. Table Games includes hundreds of titles, including Roulette European, blackjack variants and baccarat formats. Crash Games has its own category with fast titles such as Trader and Crash X Football. Live Games create the feeling of a real casino with dealers, interactive presentation and classic rules. We also offer Bingo, Keno, Scratch Cards, Minigame and Virtual Sports for users who enjoy variety. Demo mode helps players explore mechanics before real-money play. Shark Casino brings large categories, themed collections and clear navigation into one gaming lobby.


Originals and Fast Games

  • • Limbo: a fast format with simple decisions and quick pacing.
  • • Mines: a grid-pick game built around risk and gradual reveal.
  • • Keno: a number-based format with short rounds and clear mechanics.
  • • Dice: a classic fast-game mechanic for instant betting.
  • • Advanced Dice: an expanded dice format for more flexible play.
  • • Plinko: a visual mini-game with ball drop mechanics and fast results.
  • • Diamonds: a compact game with simple structure and instant outcomes.
  • • Wheel: a wheel-based format for users who enjoy visual momentum.

Shark Specials and Slots

  • • Jaws of Justice: a shark-style themed slot with dynamic atmosphere.
  • • Big Bass Splash 1000: a fishing game with vivid presentation and bonus energy.
  • • Release the Kraken Megaways: an ocean adventure with Megaways mechanics.
  • • Octo Attack: an underwater-themed slot with quick visual pacing.
  • • Jawsome Pirates: a pirate game with a signature shark mood.

  • • Queen of Atlantis: an underwater theme with strong visual style.
  • • Gates of Olympus 1000: a popular slot with mythological energy.
  • • Sugar Rush Super Scatter: a colourful slot with scatter mechanics and bonus potential.
  • • Wanted Dead or a Wild: a high-action slot for fans of intense bonus rounds.

Live, Table, Crash and Other Formats

  • • Roulette European: classic roulette inside table games.
  • • Blackjack: a card format available in Originals and table games.
  • • Baccarat: a classic casino game with quick rhythm.
  • • Golden Blackjack VIP: a premium blackjack format for card-game fans.
  • • Seotda Baccarat: a distinctive baccarat format with a different presentation.

  • • Crash X Football: a football-themed crash format.
  • • Bingo: a separate category for users who enjoy a calmer pace.

  • • Virtual Sports: simulated sports events for fast-betting scenarios.

Shark Casino — Minimum and Maximum Bets by Game Area

At Shark Casino, stake limits depend on the selected game, provider, live table, bonus, account currency and promotion terms. We make selection convenient: the game card or game window shows available parameters before the session begins. Lower stakes suit users exploring Originals, slots, keno, scratch cards and minigames, while higher limits fit live games, table games and VIP play. If bonus funds are active, the maximum bet and maximum payout are displayed in the terms of the selected offer.


Game or Area Minimum Bet Maximum Bet

Slot Games and New Games from 0.10 up to 100+
Shark Specials from 0.10–0.20 up to 100+

Blackjack and Baccarat from 1 up to 5,000+

Virtual Sports from 0.10 up to 1,000+
